validation_summary.evidence: python -m py_compile on merge_batch.py exits 0 (0.14s); python -m unittest skills.development-harness.scripts.tests.test_merge_batch.TestLockContention passes 4/4 (1.6s); python -m unittest discover skills/development-harness/scripts/tests passes 164/164 up from 160 (34.5s)

checkpoint.summary: unit_023 complete. .harness/.lock O_EXCL mutex now wraps merge_batch(). New _MergeLock context manager in merge_batch.py: O_CREAT|O_EXCL|O_WRONLY on <root>/.harness/.lock, polls every 0.1s up to a 300s timeout, takes over after 600s staleness (mtime-based), writes '<pid> <iso_ts>' body for inspection. Releases on both normal and exception exit paths. merge_batch()'s full flow is now `with _MergeLock(...): _merge_batch_locked(...)`. CLI gained --lock-timeout and --lock-stale-after. 4 new tests: blocking contention (threaded, event-barriered for determinism), exception-path cleanup, stale-lock take-over, fresh-lock timeout raising MergeError with preserved pre-existing lock file. Lock wrapper is transparent to existing tests (fresh tempdirs, no cross-test contention). Test suite 160 -> 164.
checkpoint.next_action: Complete unit_024 (PHASE_005): extend skills/development-harness/scripts/sync_harness.py to detect orphaned worktrees on disk not in state.fleet, stale fleet entries whose worktrees are missing, and harness/batch_*/ branches without fleet entries. Add new cases to test_sync_harness.py.
